calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-11-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Catherine Yee for Linda Yip, Executor (via Zoom).

The court addressed the issue of a preliminary distribution made without court approval. Ms. Yee explained that neither she nor her office was aware of the distribution at the time it was made. She stated that the petitioner and her sister are the sole beneficiaries, and that the distribution did not result in harm. She apologized on behalf of her client, acknowledging that they failed to consult with counsel before making the distribution. The Court acknowledged the situation and stated that it was not taking issue with counsel but wanted to confirm that she was also surprised by the distribution.

The court took the matter under submission with the intent to allow (but not approve) the distribution.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
